text:
Chief of Wolf Pack (, Gunrō no Osa—or "Alpha Wolf" in the Viz translation) is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots". This is the chief of a Wolf Pack.
__NOTOC__

Summary

The Wolf Pack are a bunch of wolves that can walk and fight upright and have decent combat ability. This is the chief of a pack of wolves.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.598 :: 
群れで旅人を襲う狼のリーダー。Ｃクラスで最強の体力と攻撃力を誇る。長を倒さないと部下の狼は際限なく出現する。
|-
![Eng]
|No.598 :: Chief of Wolf Pack 
Leader of a wolf pack that attack travelers. Ranked C, he boasts strong attacking abilities and physical strength. As long as he remains unbeaten, his subordinate wolves continue to reappear.
|}

Trivia

As the Wolf Pack, the Chief of Wolf Pack (or its card) do not appear in either anime adaptations.
